name: Hierarchical Memory Tiers
description: Standardized levels of context retrieval and persistence.

L0_local.name: L0: Local (Workspace)
L0_local.description: Current project context, active session goals.

best_practices: Induct new stable patterns from L0 to L1 after project completion.
Keep L2 strictly about principles, not implementation details.
anti_patterns: Polluting L2 with fluctuating team preferences.
Ignoring L0 session context and relying solely on global RAG.
title: Hierarchical-memory-patterns Knowledge

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Patterns are verified through automated testing.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: The user maintains control over all generated output.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: All automated actions are logged and verifiable.
axiomAlignment.A4_non_harm: Strict safety checks prevent destructive operations.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Uniform patterns ensure predictable system behavior.
